text:
On the 1st phone con I was extremely uncomfortable & hesitated several times whether I wanted to continue answering her questions. Looking back I should’ve ended the call. I would’ve save money, a lot of stress/anxiety & time. 
T-Mobile has been dishonest to me since day 1. I pd an $11.99 overnight fee so I would receive the internet box on Friday. I received an email & when I called their # a recording would tell me it was arriving on Friday. When it didn’t arrive I let them know. I was told by several people, on different occasions, that I would get the overnight $11.99 credit back to my account in 7-10 days. .. until I called today. I noticed T-Mobile charged me $50. for internet service. I was told I would receive a $50. credit but not the $11.99. I don’t believe them. No one at T- mobile has been honest.

The worst experience ever. I could not believe that!!!
First, 18 months ago we have been lied to at the store while purchasing 2 iphones. luckily the issue was fixed after showing all the records. Second, we were charged hundreds of dollars for text messages abroad on wifi even though the internet supposedly is "free". Third, we tried to upgrade lately- we have been lied to and got only wrong information and horrible customer care. We end up been charged hundreds of dollars on a different credit cards and thousands on the billing cycle that luckily was frozen until the issue was fix. Horrific !!! never again!!! Unless this is resolved immediately- we are going to file a complain at BBB!!!

Hello Matthew,
I am emailing you today to inform you of the experience I have with T-Mobile.
I was a 30+ year Verizon customer.
I transferred to T-Mobile with 3 lines for $90.00 including Netflix on us (Veteran Plan).
Shortly after switching we went for a road trip 5 minutes away from our house my wife informed me she had no service.
My wife returned to Verizon and my Aunt (3rd) line could not operate her phone because of her age.
I contacted customer service and was told they could give me a plan for $45.00 and included Netflix if I were to stay with T-Mobile.
Every month I have to call customer service to get the $45.00 honored and beg for the Netflix. They just take $5.00 each month.
This past time they tried to get me to settle for a lower plan that doesn't include data overseas or Netflix.
They insisted it was a miss-communication. I informed then that I know what I was promised.
I explained to them that was not what I was promised when I agreed to keep the service.
You surely can look up the records of my contact with customer support and see that I have tried in earnest.
I hope that we can get this resolved so that I can continue with T-Mobile.
Thank you, Jeff

T-Mobile let’s people get scammed by allowing original owners to sell a phone then report is stolen. 

I had this happen to me. The phone had a good NON financed IMEI when I bought it. 

T Mobile refused to help me and instead said I should have buy another phone from them. 

Terrible customer service.

Had an amazing experience with t-mobile! Juan at the Riverdale store made sure we were happy with the service we were getting as well as the best deal that worked for our large family of cell phone users.

Truthfully this doesn't have anything to do with my visit but I was in the store while this was happening. One of your service experts named Matthew was extremely rude and condescending to a lady just trying to get him to show her how to remove a name and number from her phone that she didn't want on there. He treated her like she was an idiot to the point  she asked if the lady that originally helped her was working tomorrow. She finally just got up and walked out. I realize all of us are not as hip to how to phones works as the younger generations but that was not reason to treat her in such a manner. Luckily I did not have to deal with him when it was my turn in line.
You need to teach compassion for all ages of life to your employees that deal with the public.
Thanks to Elmo a T- Mobile Expert, my experience was outstanding. He should be recognized for his excellent service and professionalism.

Wow. I don’t even know where to begin. This company is straight trash. When I first signed up over the phone I stated clearly that I wanted the plan with NO CREDIT CHECK- the monthly pay as you go plan. Seems straight forward, right? WRONG. The unhelpful agent on the phone ran my credit then told me she made a mistake and couldn’t reverse it. I called back and tried to speak with a manager probably about 10 times but I would either get hung up on or transferred over to some person who had no idea what was going on then they would put me on hold and hang up. I was forced to give up because all of T-Mobile’s agents are located outside the US and clearly don’t care at all. I called a T-Mobile store near me and they claimed they couldn’t help me. I needed to call. Fast forward to December 2020. I’m ready to move to Verizon. I pay my T-Mobile bill in advance so when I cancelled I had already paid the next month and was expecting a refund. What I got was not a refund. They sent me a bill for the next month. I contact T-Mobile on Twitter because you seem to be more likely to get someone located in the US. after wasting my life messaging them forever they finally removed it right as I got a letter from a collection agency for that money they thought I owed them. They sent the made up bill to collections less than one month after posting it. Do yourself a favor and stay far far away from this frustrating company. Not to mention the app never worked and service was terrible. T-Mobile is trash.

Horrible service. I've had my phone for 2 years nothing but issues with dropped calls and no service. I live in Michigan and like to enjoy the outdoors. Anytime I go a half hour outside of any of the major cities no service. Not a good service for reliability. Not a cheap service either. Switching back to Verizon as soon as the contracts up.

I have had tmobile for years; everytime there is a promotion i qualify for i get an excuse as to why i dont get it; recently took my account from 3 lines to 2 due to my daughter getting her own line; no reduction in bill; purchased a new phone last year and was promised a discount bc of my "loyalty" which never materialized.  Recently contacted them because I noticed an ad for a discount for 55 and over and I turned 55 last year; no discount; saw an ad for first responder discount; again an excuse in spite of being a first responder.  Kicking myself for purchasing phones with this company and am shopping for another plan

i called t mobile 2 weeks ago and set up a account ,it took over 10 days and approx15 phone calls to finally get my phone activated using my old number ,i was put on hold two times for almost one hour each , my calls to t mobile were disconnected many times i was told i would get a call back ,nope,,so now after all that i still have poor service cant make call except from my home, on the phone again and now t mobile says my phone is not compatable with there service tried to sell me a phone ,nope just give my money back so i can get a good service in my area ,call was droped ,they said they would prorate my four days service used . can you believe it ? the closest t mobile store is forty miles away but i guess i will have to go there to cancel service and try to get my money back , but i dout it .just one awful experience.

Horrible worst cell company ever, I was lied to and when I did talk about aspects of my plan they were never noted or saved. Only things that was benefiting themselves were ever noted. There customer service agent told me we were fully paid off so my wife and I left for another carrier and then out of no where and with our my consent they charged my card over 200 dollars saying it was to pay off the equipment that I forfeited when I canceled and switched carriers. Totally not true. I will never recommend T-Mobile or go back to them. If you want a trusted carrier go with Verizon.  Not crooks like T-Mobile.

I contacted Customer Service today. During that call I was told that for the same amount I was paying I could have unlimited data (I've been supposedly paying for unlimited data for over a year) or I could be moved to a lower plan ($10 less a month) for the same service I've had all this time for which I was paying more... I decided to switch to the lowest one (I was already having that plan anyway) and instead of making the change of the plan they cancelled my account!  I called again and tried to fix the problem.  When I explained to the technician my situation he explained to me that T-mobile plans are not updated automatically and the customer needs to be analyzing better plans if they want a better deal.  I told them that was unfair because if they have loyal customers they deserved to be treated the same as the new customers.  He hung up on me without activating my service again.  Really disappointed to have paid them for so long for a bad service and horrible customer service.  I should have switched to another carrier a long time ago

Thanks to Aislyn for helping me out !! 
#TeamRoy in #Utah

Worst phone service ever ! I’ve had T-Mobile for 6 years recently left paid off my phone and my balance just to hear from A collection agency I still owed after I paid everything in full with a store rep . Do not waste your time will T-Mobile  Verizon is a better provider  and they actually answer the phone

My android phone was locked and I could not logon to even make a phone call to report the problem. Finally a friend tried to call for me. After standing in line for fifteen minutes we gave up. I sent a text message and email to them to call me. Someone did finally call, but was describing a way to fix the network portion of my phone, not the home screen unlock. Fortunately we found a home screen unlock video and fixed the problem. Without that video I would still be locked out. T Mobile needs to improve upon helping those that cannot use their phone!
The worst.  Terrible customer service and the digits line does not work.

Tried Tmobile home internet WORSE service I have ever received. The internet wouldn't work they couldn't figure it out so I canceled my service with in 10 days of getting it because it would not work! They then continued to charge me... I spent multiple phone calls and HOURS on the phone then as soon as I think we got it all worked out I get ANOTHER Bill in the mail over 2 months after I cancel the service !!! I cannot put into words how awful this service is!
Was a faithful customer for five years! When I changed carriers they trashed my credit because returned equipment was stuck in the snow! REALLY T-Mobile!!

If I could leave no stars I would! This company is complete garbage! We had this service for only 12 days one lines (out of 3 lines) was activated sent the phones back  because my husband got no service anywhere and now they send us a bill for $250! Remind you for service that was hit or miss!! I would not recommend this company to anyone even if they paid me to!!! Stay far away! You get NO service & than they want all your money!!!!

I had an emergency when their towers were down for almost 3 days!! I got my light back faster than my phone service. I couldn’t call anyone, I have 2 toddlers and I’m alone most of the time with them. It’s absolutely crucial for the phone service to be up and running as fast as possible, the response time was ridiculous! As paying customers we shouldn’t have to wait so long to get up and running! I’m going to get verizon because satellite service is necessary in today’s time! Cheap companies like T-Mobile that profit off of us need to get on the same boat and use satellite signal! So much money and can’t even provide a good service so done with yall, **update** I did switch because the rep said it would take 2 weeks for the towers to be fully functional! In Oregon when we had only 2 days of snow yet I was charged at a full functionality rate. Haha and on top of that they prioritize certain cities because the city folk matter more than any of the outskirts

Sprint customer but they’re now T Mobile... They have the worst customer service by phone I’ve ever experienced with any company.  Agents don’t know what they’re doing half of the time and take forever to accomplish anything, and then it’s extremely long holds to talk to a supervisor.  I’ve had multiple situations where agents promised to do certain things like credit my account or send me a SIM card or call me back to follow up and all were failures and flat out lies.  Supervisor Sakura most recently completely dropped the ball completely and didn’t follow through with any of her promises after I’d spent 2 hours on the phone, but it’s not the first time an agent has wasted my time.  Every time you call be sure you have an hour or more because every call is a time suck.  So inefficient!  Horrible!  They need to do better!

Wish I could give less than one star. Their customer service is horrendous. They shut my phone off even though I paid my bill. They say they didn’t receive it but I showed them proof I did. Go with ANYBODY else but these people

I had to transfer a prepaid account number to a prepaid ESIM. This was the worst customer service experience I've had in my entire live. Neither at the shop in Manhattan, nor on the phone was anyone able to help me successfully transfer my number, even though I paid for both SIMs. Never ever, again. Ella, Em, thanks for being patient, but it was a struggle.

I'd like to compliment the employee, "Katrina" at the Denver, Lowry T-Mobile store.  I went in with three cell phones needing to erase one, transfer data and then do the same with the other two.  She put in over an hour of assistance with a smile on her face.  No money transacted, just good plain customer service.  THANK 
YOU

If I could put millions of negative stars, I would! I have been with AT&T for many years (pre-paid, as I do NOT allow cell phone companies to rip me off) and although it was not perfect, I was perfectly satisfied with what I had and what I was paying. I was told I'd be even more satisfied w/ T-Mobile (not pre-paid, but no contract either)- I asked the rep if I will ever hear whoever I am calling say "What? I cannot hear you...) as would sometimes happen w/ AT&T and I was told "I guarantee you will never hear anyone say that with T-Mobile". So when my new phone arrived and I set it up and made my very first call w/ my new service, the very first thing the person on the other end said was, "What? I cannot hear you...", and it's been nothing but downhill from there...
Sure, the customer service is very good, but what good is great CS if the basics are no good? I got the Samsung Galaxy A-11 or whatever it's called and the device is pure crap; Opens apps and other features when the POS is just sitting there on the table and I've not even touched it- Locks when I am using it- Go with another carrier...

Always dropping calls, cant send texts, receive multiples of the same text, losing service all the time and then phone won't recieve texts for hours. I picked T-Mobile because of the coverage but really the coverage is POOR.
My text messages will randomly take several minutes to send

I'd like to compliment two employees at your Barra Road Biddeford, ME store.  I was in there about 2PM today, 2/14/21.  They arranged for my phone's warranty to be used because the phone stopped working after 2 months.  They did some checking and made this possible with a lot of professionalism and courtesy.  Thank you!

Ordered a buy one get one free.
I sent one back bc wrong device.
Now I'm trying to order new device.
I've been on the phone for two hours. OMG 2 hours!!!
Talked to 3 people finally got someone who understood. We got disconnected.
She called me back but, by then I had to go to the bathroom, and missed her call.
I called again and talked to 3 more people and they kept sending me to sales, then customer support, then sales.
Got disconnected. They haven't called back.
I'm calling a third time, and starting alll over!
09735o8tuoxkhjgvoisd8hvdhqrhj**%Y
Today is February 13, 2021.  I just received a text from Sprint T mobile telling me my data resets December 25, 2020.  Perhaps I am expecting too much.

Please heed these words and save yourself stress headaches and extra $. I don't care what good "deal" they offer it does not make sense to sign up with this company when the other major competitors offer such better customer service. Family signed up for a BYONEGETONE phone deal Jan 1st. Even tho we gave 2 different addresses to ship the phones to they shipped both to my relative's address. Thought it would be an easy fix to mail one phone to me. They wouldn't do it. Finally after calling 15+ times and stopping into the stores we finally stumbled upon one rep that sent me my phone (she even said it was hard for her to do). I got the phone on February 10, took it to the store to get my number ported over and guess what? They wouldn't do it because I wasn't an account owner. I was on the phone on the day we signed up with Tmobile and my relative put me down as an account owner right then and also did it a second time when it was realized the first time didn't stick. The store wouldn't help us do it because we had to call customer service to do it. Still 6 weeks later don't have my number on my new phone and am paying on two accounts because of this. Of course they won't adjust the phone bill even tho I never had the phone because the phone was technically sent and turned on. WORST customer experience ever. RUN AWAY!!!

I have been a T-Mobile customer for a little under a month and I have not been able to log into to T-Mobile app. Can't even pay my phone bill through the app. They do this purposely to force people to have to pay in person which includes a Ten dollar fee. That's highway robbery.

T- mobile was the the worst phone service and company that I have ever had, I feel bad for anyone that ever has them for a phone service. If it were possible to give a zero star review I would give it to them!

I'm a senior and Veteran and T-mobile service is terrible everyday t-mobile comes on my phone and says serivce disabled emergency calls only . I'm suppose to have an unlimited plan , there tech person said the tower is way overloaded and they have to close some circuits from time to time. they cut my bill in half for a few months  but that doesn't help.

Two store were awesome. Swansea, Ma (Chris and Nicole) Dartmouth, Ma (Yaris and Yolanda).
I was in a difficult situation and all these employees came up big for me. BIG. I’m glad I chose Sprint/T-Mobile.

If I can give a negative star I will . T-Mobile customer service is horrible . Whether they are custom reps from the US or overseas . I always have problems with them . I was working 2 days ago and  they cut off my line without texting me that my old no was put back . I had to find out the hard way . I spoke with a supervisor  from the US and when he asked if I am recommending TMobile to my friends and I said not sure . This morning when I woke up my phone was not working and I was rerouted to the TMobile . I. Spoke to o a customer rep and she said that my phone line was put in temporary suspension ( even if I don’t owe any Money ) . The latest customer  rep that turned it on and I had to assure her that I will recommend TMobile to my friends make sure that my phone no will be in temporary suspension because of spite  😱🥶🤯😨😷😷😷😷-

There customer service is terrible. There unskilled and they lie. You call with a problem and they just repeat themselves over and over again. These sales reps will mess up your billing and if you talk to a supervisor they’ll just back whatever lie there reps are telling. It’s the same over phone or at the store.

Hi, I just wanted T Mobile to know how very pleased with the service I received at the T Mobile on White Bear Ave and larpenteur store 2/9/21 the people you have working their are fantastic , tonight  I stopped in and (Remi)  took care of me , my issues were beyond my expertise, Remi right away saw me come in and said, hello how can I help you, that's a great start! Yep I did get the best care necessary to resolve my problems with my phone,  Remi thank you so very much, I was so tired of the troubles I was having,  you were able to fix the problem and show me what to do in case it happens again you are awesome ! you turned a bad day into a great day....again... Thank you very much ,Jenny

Classic Bait-and-Switch Scam -
I had to sit back and shake my head when I realized what T-Mobile offered me as a "Promotion". 
1 -I buy 2 iPhone 12 Pro Max phones at full retail from them. They make the profit from Apple. 
2- T-Mobile will give me $730 over 24 months. They call it a "buy one get one free promotion" but it is limited to a max of $730. My 2 phones are $2600. They give me this over 24 months, so it is about $30 a month. 
3- I MUST add a new line which I have no need for and will cost me about $730 over the same 24 months. Surprise, this is a cost of about the same amount as the aforementioned credit of $30. $30 in and $30 out. What a clever idea they have come up with. 
4- They get me locked into this contract for 2 years.
5- They hope to get new customers from my efforts to find someone for the new line. Seriously, how many people welcome an offer that requires a new line. Are we stupid? It does 90% of us no good. It's because it does them a lot of good. 

So they want me (all of us) to go find them a new customer for the new line. They want to lock me into a contract for 24 months. At the end of the 24 months I get a grand total of $0 because they give me $730 but take $730 from me. They get the profit from Apple for selling 2 iPhones at full retail price. 
When you get your next statement you will see a $30 credit for you "discount" and right below that you will see your $30 charge (almost) for your shiny new line, and then feel like you were duped; a big sucker.

I get nothing from them but get locked for 24 month and I do the work to get them a new line customer.

T-Mobile is absolutely horrible. I used my checking account to pay my bill and a few days later they said my check was returned and the payment never hit my bank. I started using another checking about everything was fine then I noticed my payment wasn’t deducted from my account and was told it was returned by my bank. My bank said that was not true. Now I can’t use any of my checking accounts. I started using my savings account. Two payments went through then I received a text message on a Sunday at 8:13a saying they was problem with my payment and to go online to make a payment. My account online was saying the payment was still processing. I’ve spoken to 4 different people and finally a supervisor called and left a message saying I’m unable to use any of my account because of return checks!! They can’t show me it was returned by my bank. I’m looking for a different phone company. THEY ARE THE WORST COMPANY

T-Mobile sucks and they are dishonest I changed from Verizon (biggest mistake of my life) to T-Mobile and they told me to trade in my new iPhone 11 then it had 265gb pro max and told me that my phone from Verizon would not only completely cover my crap phone T-Mobile gave me and even like cover my bill they said would be under $100 a month for like 6 months then 2 months later my bill is 165.00 a month MORE THAN VERIZON WAS which is why I switched in the first place and they don’t know anything about what was promised me because of course they can’t keep employees and the one that helped me isn’t with T-Mobile anymore and I am having to make payments on the crap phone T-Mobile gave me and they didn’t give me any credit towards my bill or phone as I was told and customer service just said “oh I don’t know what to tell you all I can see is that you started service with us in October 2020 and you picked a iPhone 11 and your making payments on it” BEWARE BUNCH OF SCAM ARTISTS I am going back to Verizon and they just get to keep my $1000 phone I “traded” them when I started service because when I spoke to a lawyer they said it would cost more to take them to court.

I like tmobile but I haven't had service at my house in Sacramento for 6 days. My customers cannot reach me. I am thinking if I get att right now I will have a business again. Been with this company for 12 years. I'm worried I may need to fix this myself
They are so bad I prefer a phone it’s been to montes they messed up 2 and currently waiting on a refund but don’t order you will not get a phone from them

I switched over to T-mobile and thought I was going to end up ahead on monthly costs compared to my current carrier. BIG MISTAKE!! They sent me a phone I did not order and when I called them on it, I was told that they would email me a UPS label to send that phone back and get credit on it. Fast forward from Mid December 2020 to late early February 2021...I have been in contact, or attempted contact with well over a dozen of their customer service representatives and get a different story every single time I talk to one of them! Not a joke; every single time they told me something different. I was continuing to be billed through autopay, so I called and told them that not only would I turn them in for deceiving people, but not fully ever taking care of what their mistake was in the first place. One of the reps actually was accusing me of not sending in the phone guard with the phone, so they were going to have to charge me for that. I told him that if I did not see the money taken off my bank account by the next day, they could expect that I would be letting my bank know and have their Fraud unit take a look at it. When I would call and ask why they were continuing to charge me when I physically had the phone for one day and have not had it since then, so therefore could not use the phone, it was like I was speaking a foreign language to them; they just didn't comprehend what I was saying!! I would not recommend this company to my worst enemy, and that speaks volumes!

Zero stars just signed up with TMobile bought brand new phones and already having problems with one phone and they want to replace with a refurbished phone and charge 20 even though we have the insurance!!!

T-Mobile was once one of the best wireless carriers but since the Sprint merger they have fallen to one of the worst. Their customer service was absolutely hands down the very best, when you called you got someone local to your area, now it's someone in P.I  or India or where ever and they are absolutely worth less. They lied to me and my wife 3 times then denied it. Just use another carrier

This company is a bunch of B.S. they will try anyway to suck money out of its customers, I paid my phone off then get a bill that I didn't pay it off just the lease, oh I had a new phone and replaced it, what did I get a refurbished phone that barely works half the time from freezing up or restarting, but T- mobile doesn't tell you is that they go thru a third party who sent me this piece of crap. When I got this phone, 5g was being introduced, and my phone's internet, did even work outside for 3 months . Don't do business, with this money grubbing company, who will surprise bill you out of left field oh and this was my 2nd refurbished, phone because the first refurbished, phone didn't work, sorry says T-Mobile, not our problem. Deceptive business practices. Shame on you.

Zero stars. I cancelled in Nov 2020 after many years on autopay in good standing. They sent a cancel confirmation for my 3 lines. In Dec 2020 they autodeducted $92. I called to stop that billing and the autopay. They said I had a line on the account. The phone # was not mine, was for an inactive #. I requested a refund. They declined. In Jan. 2021 they sent another bill for $80. I declined to pay. They reduced it to $55.55. I declined. Today Feb.5. I received a collection notice. They claim I added this line in 2016. How many people have had this happen to them? Join me in spreading the word about this practice of billing for inactive lines upon cancellation.

If you are with AT&T stay do NOT change to T-Mobile.  Phone experts are very nice but I have been trying for 2 months to get my voicemail fixed.  Been on phone for hours sometimes will work and then stops working.  No one can leave a message.  Went into their store in Blue Springs, Mo help was poor snd a don’t care attitude.  The voice mail works when T-Mobile calls.  The snotty employee may be the manager think her name is Whitney.  She told me it was other callers phones and I would have to bring their phones to the store.  How do you bring a land phone or a phone from a doctors office?  When I bought the phone 8 months ago she rooked me into getting a free tablet wink wink.  Costs me $10 a month for 24 months and was not informed of this.  They have a good phone plan but get back money by cheating customers.  Even when they couldn’t fix my voicemail phone people trying to sell me a free wink wink watch.  Plan to go back with AT&T as soon as it will not cost me.  I had AT&T for 15 or 20 years they were always honest and would have had voicemail fixed in a New York minute.  Unless you want to be tortured stay away from T-Mobile.

edits.text: If you want to be treated horrible go to T Mobile.  Purchased IPhone 11pro and unfortunately changed from AT&T which I had been with for years.  Phone works good so far and the guy that sold it to me was very helpful and nice.  I was rooked into their free wink wink Alcatel Joy Tablet.  Called their expert phone support and the representative was the rudest no help mess and talked hateful to me so I hung up.  The Iphone  $500 off is credited to you over 24 months and no one told me this.  There is a $10 a month charge for service on the Tablet for 24 months never informed me.  I asked twice if tablet was free and no $10 charge mentioned just told it was a promotion plan.

text:
I am a new t-mobile user.  I visited a store in Renoldsburg Oh to ask for help with my Google assistant.  Unfortunately when they replaced my sim card they deleted photos and contacts from my phone.  Devastating. Couldn't get anything back.
I went to the Pataskala store and was helped to at least get my apps in the right places and helped me secure backup so this shouldn't happen again. So thankful for Grant and his caring attitude.   I have worked retail and I know how valuable a good employee can be.  He went above and beyond to help me.  Kudos to Grant.

The t-mobile store at 1578 Hempstead, Elmont needs a new store manager. This woman isn't professional, gossips, pushes items on you because she's focused on her commission. Then, when you have an issue and you go back she isn't willing to help, but to make the sale oh she was ever so sweet.This store is never busy, yet there is always a wait time, for her to make personal phone calls?The lack of professionalism at this store,has turned me off. Further, T-mobile needs to train employees better, or have some kind of secret shops available to monitor their employees. I've had Sprint, and Verizon, and this by far has been my worst experience with a provider. Calling wise even when you call in half of these people can't answer your questions, but try to sell to you. I'm beyond disgusted with t-mobile.

I had a bad experience with T mobile, I switched to sprint and it is the same thing. Now that sprint and t mobile merged together, we thought the connection it will be better, but it is not. I have slow service here in Jarrell TX. Talked to them many times but issue is the same. If you live in Jarrell stay away from t mobile and sprint. As soon as I pay off my phone, I will go to Verizon and never go back.

We switched to T Mobil in September 2020 from day 1 when make a call the other person can’t hear me for about 10 seconds, 6 months later and 20 calls or trips to get fixed, they contact apple for help, apple runs 3 diagnostic test and finds a faulty speaker, of course this is out of the 30 day in store warranty and it cost 565.00 to ship me a new phone. Then when the y get the bad phone back I’ll get a credit !!! Bull

The worse service I've ever had!!!!! They will scam u out of money.. Missed calls tex messages that take hr to receive.   Try cancel service. Go to store. They tell me have call customer service. So call and get run around for almost hr. Now 3 months later get letter my account is delinquent. I owe them for 3months service I never used.going turn over collection. So call customer service again. Give them account #. That's not enough. They need email n password #. Told them I cancel 3 months ago n don't have any that information. So tell me go to a store n cancel there. When I 1st went to store n told me they couldn't cancel had to call customer service. Going to store.Not going hide how upset I am. Not going leave until they handle this.

If I could give negative stars, I would.
I didn't even get phone service activated with T-Mobile before the problems started.
I messaged T-Mobile via their website to activate services and was quoted a price that was supposed to include taxes, fees, and payment on a phone.
When I got the customer agreement in my email the price was $30.00/month more than the quote I was given. I have screen shots of my original price quote and follow up messages from the sales representative promising to fix the customer agreement so it matched the price I was quoted.
After DAYS of getting excuses from sales associate, I decided to call into the company.
 What followed was HOURS of my life on the phone with incompetent, clueless, and rude customer service agents.
I was transferred from department to department, explaining the issue over and over again with no one willing to do anything to help.
I was "disconnected" during calls on three occasions, leaving me to call in and start the whole process over again.

The issue wasn't resolved by the time my phone came, 5 days later (today), and I open the shipping box to find that they sent me the wrong phone, which I paid a $300.00 down payment on.

I just want to cancel the user agreement and get a refund on the phone, but I can't seem to get anyone there to help me with that either.

You would have to be crazy to sign up for phone service with T-Mobile, and if you we're crazy before you did, you will be once you have to deal with them.

This is a terrible cell phone service. Can not successfully use data to watch my shows. Very slow, buffering, kicked off. No one can fix it. I have spent so much time on hold and speaking to people that don't know English trying to get help and no one can fix it. I'm researching other providers. It got even worse when they brought on sprint. Don't use them!!

edits.text: T-Mobile is terrible. Constant error messages, getting kicked off shows I'm watching. Shows and websites take forever to load if at all. I have made endless calls to try to get service fixed and it seems they can't. I'm tired of paying for crappy service.

Terrible experience. Have spent many hours in the phone trying to get help. Constant buffering, error messages and getting kicked off due to technical errors. No one can fix it, it seems. Plus, if it's right before the billing cycle changes, nothing works, nothing loads and can't watch anything. This is not "unlimited data". Im so sick of it

text: This is the absolute worst prepaid phone plan I have ever experienced! They have spam block but provide NO WAY OR MECHANISM for prepaid services to enable it. Tmobile is horrible horrible horrible customer service. Stay away from them!
Stupid! Crooksss!!! Been costumer for 4 years and i paid everything to own the phone and change my carrier to cheaper bcoz of pandemic what they did is they want me to 400+$$ for the final bill 🤬🤯

Trick me to get into a contract and did not granted what they offered me. Called several times and they told me that was solved, but never did. They delayed the time that you can get out of the contract. Do not recommend.
Never trust them and try to record all of your conversations with them

My new Samsung phone crashed after 5 months. Costco wouldn't take it back because it was past their 90 day policy on phones. T-Mobile support asked me to describe the problem, transferred me to Tech Support, who asked me to describe the problem and finished up by saying "we'll send you a new phone." That's pretty much the whole story, called on Friday, got the new phone on Monday.

For some reason this communication company has the WORST time communicating. I have been trying to log onto the online site for months. Every time I do, I get an error message that 'They have their wires crossed'. Every month, they do not process my auto pay correctly (for whatever reason I cannot explain!), my service is shut off and I miss about 3 hours of phone calls and message that are NOT retrievable according to the last unintelligent representative I spoke with. I have tried to ask for online assistance and have been told they cannot help me because I cannot log into my account to verify! WHAT A JOKE!! I am trying to resolve this and it is nothing but hassle. This company is the absolute worst!

edits.text:
They are the worst!!! I enrolled in auto-pay and EVERY MONTH since I have signed up, the auto-pay doesnt go through, they turn my service off for an hour; I miss calls and messages, all through no fault of my own.
I have been apologized to and explained that there is nothing wrong with my bank account (yeah, no s^%t!!), they are sorry for the inconvenience and they will look into it. In the mean time, I have been told I would receive a credit, that I never have. I have been GUARANTEED by numerous supervisors that this would not occur again and it has. I have been told absolute nonsense from this company. What a disgrace!!!!!!!!!!!!!

text:
T-Mobile customer for 8 years with 4 lines, autopay, never missed a payment. Coverage was terrible compared to other carriers. Cancelled my account. Double billed. Returned "signal booster" and received bill for $329. Called to confirm they had received signal booster and was told it was received. Then I got a notification from collection agency for $329. Disputed charge and got removed from collections. Called T-Mobile to request in writing that I don't owe them, and they said they cannot send confirmation to that effect.

T Mobile is a criminal organization with subpar service.

Had T-Mobile while I was in Hawaii for 3 years in the military. Moved to Florida and switch to Verizon as T-Mobile coverage is bad where I live which through military orders is legal. Payed off my phone and last month of service plan and was told my account was canceled. Instead T-Mobile suspended my account and phones but did not cancel the service plan. I got a call 3 months later for debt collection of 355$ because this business did not close out my account. I had to take them to small claims court because they refused to drop the charges. STAY AWAY FROM THESE PEOPLE!

Had an old flip phone that didn't work on the TMobile network any longer. Bought a new TMobile phone with no data plan and was unable to unlock the phone when there was no coverage and the phone simply didn't work.  Tried to port the number to a new service provider and TMobile wouldn't unlock the phone to use that hardware with the new provider. The TMobile rep said I needed to have $100 in prepaid minutes to unlock the phone.  

Solution:  Contacted the new provider - the number had already ported - and bought a new phone with that provider.  I won't be a hostage to TMobile.  The useless phone that they wouldn't unlock was destroyed.

Costly - but this is a warning about TMobile.

Take care -

Michelle (T-Mobile, Market St., Flowood, MS), my sales rep/phone tech was extremely nice, first and foremost. Although I had to make a second visit because Tyler the first rep two days earlier was not knowledgeable enough to get my current phone data transferred to my new phone. I left the store without a working phone. For the next two days I tried transferring the data myself to no avail. Today, Michelle went through the exact steps needed to get my data transferred and took less than 15 minutes to complete the process.  My phone is working as it should; very well!!! I’m extremely satisfied with her (Michelle’s) customer service, knowledgeable disposition and kindness.  This’ll be my store wheb I need to return to T-Mobile fir anything cellular because of Michelle, (Flowood, Mississippi store on Market Street).

When T-Mobile acquired Sprint that's when my problems started.  I lost features on my phone and the techs in the local offices didn't have a clue what to do.  I couldn't connect with wi-fi even when I was in the stores.  I had to call support and was put on hold several times and told I had to be referred to the technical support people.  It took me almost two hours with them to get one function restored back on my phone.  I'm switching to Verizon and hope it's better.

I find it incredibly frustrating and disappointing that you have to have the person with the name on the account to get any basic help. This is incredibly inconvenient. If something happens to the account person or they are unavailable, I can't get any help. Why not at least hear the problem out. Maybe it's nothing serious and you can help. Right now I still can't send or receive calls or texts from my new phone. If there's an emergency, I'm screwed.

Beware ! I was a t-mobile customer for 12 years and 2 lines with automatic payments and never missed a payment. When I decided to switch to another mobile company, T-mobile double-charge me for my final bill. At first the did not want to provide a PIN number that new carrier need in order to transfer my phone numbers, then I called in and canceled before my bill ended, then they charged me for he full bill amount!  When I contact them to get an explanation they told me that I am charged for 10 days however those 10 days are the same amount like the entire month even tho I called to cancel before the billing end date and stoped using them ...they told me they can't do anything about it. I’m much more happy with another company at least my calls are not dropping constantly!

Sprint T-mobil is a ripoff. They are not customer friendly and their customer service representative was was very disrespectful. They  don't  fully explain the contract and you wind up paying double for a phone that you don't own. Such a RIPOFF!!!!!!
Had a wonder experience at tmobile store Tidewater Dr, with customer rep James. James was knowledgeable, observant, patient and very helpful. Thank you James for your assistance!

I recently left At&T to come to T mobile, had a rough
experience in the begining but when I spoke to 
Cory B from Idaho my stress level went way down.
She provided me with the best customer service.
She always followed through , called me numerous
times.Thank you Cori.
You are the best.


e

Beware !!! I had t-mobile for 2 years with month to month plan. When I try to switch to another mobile company, T-mobile double-charge me for my final bill. When I tried to contact them to explain my situation; however, they told me they can't do anything about it.

Went to T-Mobile told them that I was having trouble with my phone...they told me that I was past the 14 day exchange period...I was at 21 days.  They informed me that it was now a Samsung issue.  Thanks for NO help T-Mobile....Seriously...try Xfinity

edits.text: FYI 2 out of the last 3 customer service representatives that I spoke to at T-Mobile don't even have their phone service with T-Mobile... 2 out of the last 3 service representatives that I spoke to have their phone service with AT&T... That tells you something right there that something is wrong at T-mobile

I have been a T-Mobile customer for 10 years you think that much loyalty would earn you a little bit of respect... I pay $1400 for a Samsung note 20 ultra and no one at T-Mobile told me I do not have 5G in my area... Maybe if they spent a little less on advertising and a little more on 5G towers I could have 5G in my area

text: If I could rate a zero I would. Took my phone in for a screen repair. They did not have the screen and sent phone in. They erased all pictures and contacts on phone without providing notice. I could of had it backed up on another device if i would have known.

I have been a customer with T-MOBILE for over 20 years: however, T-MOBILE only validates me as a customer for 12 years- T-Mobile has caused safety issues for the majority of its customers.  T-MOBILE states It takes them 5-8 days to effectively resolve tower coding network issues- I would give this company no stars if that could be an option.

Disgusting
5+ year customer
Nurse 10+ years
No discount program to help
Will switch to Verizon (which offers 10% discount and better service) after completing payments on my phone (I can use it internally because it had a SIM).

I have been a customer of Team Mobile for 12 years!
Before coming to Team Mobile I experienced all the major cell phone companies.
Without a doubt Team Mobile has provided me with the best customer service bar none!  TM Staff are patient and courteous.  Tech support is superlative!

Recently I purchased the new TM internet service.  At $50.00 per month for unlimited data this is a steal.  I set and added 3 devices by myself...and I am 74!  It was that easy.

I can say I have had a few issues from time to time, but nothing that was not quickly resolved with the friendly and knowledgeable Team Mobile staff.

Susan

I tried to open a new account with a new phone by phone at T-Mobile... FOR THREE HOURS! They couldn't get over the fact I was a good customer with Sprint for over a decade: "We show you have an open account with Sprint." "Yes, I do." "We can't start an account with you at T-Mobile, we are not 'allowed'."

WHAT A JOKE! You can't even call T-Mobile on a Sprint phone, they will switch you to Sprint every time! Just try asking for a supervisor- They will make sure you will never talk to one!

I purchased a phone out of my own pocket with warranty coverage. I was instructed to ship the phone back and I would get a replacement. It has been over 30 days and still no phone. I have spent over 10 hours on the phone trying to get this resolved with no help. It deserves less than 1 star.

If I could give zero stars, I would. This is the worse service EVER. I would recommend that anyone who wants to go with T-mobile. I have been with T-Mobile for 6 days and I have had nothing but problems. I switched to T-Mobile for phone compatibility issues because my previous carrier could not support my new phone. My husband has T-Mobile and he has found the service declining. We are switching to another carrier ASAP. Buyer Be Aware.
WORST SERVICE EVER WITH HIGH PRICES. DON’T FALL FOR IT

I have been a customer of T- mobile for well over 18 years now. I Moved to Las Vegas from Seattle Washington. Since being here, I have gone to a couple of T- mobile stores in my area, and I must say that I was NOT pleased with the customer service at either location ! However, I did not give up on locating a T- mobile store, that I would be satisfied with. As time went by, I did find a T- mobile store, close to where I do some of my shopping. The moment that I walked in, I just knew, that I was in the PERFECT T- mobile store. I was Pleasantly surprised. I was Immediately greeted by a friendly staff members, The wait timewas very short. The sales associate was very helpful & knowledgeable. The associate Eddie, and store manager Shiloh, helped me with getting a new phone for my Grandson. They both went above and beyond. I thank them. They now have a customer for LIFE ! So if you are looking for great t- mobile customer service, head over to 6525 N. Decatur Blvd. suite # 130 Las Vegas, Nevada 89131 On Decatur & the 215 (Awesome Store )
Coverage was really bad and people couldn't call me. When I canceled them they kept taking money from my bank account.

I was so impressed with the T-Mobile on Lawrenceville-Suwanne Road, Suwanne, GA.  I am a 65 year old female with limited knowledge about technology.  I young man named Breenen was the customer service representative that waited on me.  He was very patient, informative, professional and had a wonderful demeanor about him.  I think he could see at some point I looked like a deer in headlights and still did not make me feel stupid.  Ha. He gave me a short tutorial before I left. The teaching time and porting of information and number over to the new phone did not take barely 30 minutes.  I had planned to spend a couple of hours. This young man is an asset to your company.

Wish I could give less than 1 star.  Absolute incompetents in the customer service department.  NEVER been able to get anything accomplished accurately the first time (or 2nd/3rd) contacting them.  So happy I switched carriers last year then get a collections bill from TMobile today!!  Of course I cant get anything straightened out with them over the phone
Screwed me on trade of iPhone 7+ for new iPhone 12 Pro Max. They promised $300 for my perfect iPhone but only allowed $73. Screw them im switching to Verizon

I would give T Mobile no stars if I could. I ordered a new Pro Mac I phone and did not like the size. Took it back to store in Lakewood Colorado and I will never step into that store again. They botched my new order, ordered phone again and then cancelled the order with no reason as to why that happened. It took 6 weeks for me to get a phone. They charged us a monthly fee and didn't give us the proper credit with the returned phone. Customer service on the phone is not much better.

I wish I could give them less than one star because that’s what they deserve. Customer service is awful, they don’t help you on the phone or in the stores. Do not leave Verizon or AT&T to save 10 dollars a month it’s NOT worth it. Was going to switch over but they were unable to move my number over from AT&T but because the phone was already opened I was charged a 70 dollar “storage fee”. Absolutely ridiculous. Worst service provider around.

Lies of convenience, first we bill in advance but when you cancel the charge your account for another month. Protect your self and call your bank and reject any more ACH billing.  I wish I could give zero stars. Lies lies lies thieves. 190.00 I will never get back
I wish there was zero stars or minus one, that's what Tmobile deserves. They have become so annoying, taking 2 hours to answer a customer service call!

I loved t mobile until they merged with sprint.I have had to call tech 2x and you can't talk with them because the connection on phone is so bad.So no help there.We have 5 phones and I am going to take 2 phones and try elsewhere. Our phone service IS AWFUL!!I don't know what happened but I a sorry I referred people.And don't try Verizon they are worse.

*UPDATE*. Found I had 360 protection and they never even told me ended up having to add another upgrade. Suspect AF just like a baby mom's pretending that $ never came.

I have never wrote a review in my life so this has value.... I'd perfer not to be manipuled like I'm a child. I have not been in the plan more than a month and I had to literally upgrade to a newer phone just to use my service. The first one was garbage and broke instantly with that being said I was told to pay it in full or I could not get a new device. Well that was False. With that being said.... 

This is for EVERYONE TO KNOW.

THAT N100 PHONE IS AMAZING AND I GOT IT BECAUSE I FELT LIKE I HAD TO FOLLOW WHAT EVERYONE IS BUYING. Phone is literally amazing get it if you can before it's just conveniently gone And discontinued.

Worst service ever!!! Over 20 years with Nextel then sprint and now tmobile.  Since t mobile took over I've lost cell service multiple times with no warning and then was told by tech support that I needed to update my user profile.  I have over 10 phones for my business and they just shut your phone down without even a text for some kind of update. I went about a day the first time thinking it was a outage!! Now I dont get texts , group messages,  and service is horrible and I have to dial a number maybe 10 times before it will actually go through.  Was told we need new sims for all of our phones but will have to purchase them . I'll be with Verizon soon. Figured out the name "Terrible Mobile "

Two phone calls for information yielded almost an hour of wasted time. The agents in the Philippines were very sweet, but nowhere near informed enough to help figuring out even the most basic questions comparing plans. The biggest phone conglomerate with the worst customer service. SMDH

This company is the most dishonest company I have ever done business with. They took my phone in on trade, lied to me saying the phone I received would be fully paid for then charged me $2700 for a $800 phone. Took my Xs max and said they credited my account $1000. The phone they gave me was being given away for free.... DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THIS HORRIBLE PLACE!!!!

I had a very bad experience with in person costumer service a prior day but today I called the technical support team and I was very pleased with Roi. He was very professional and very respectful and he fixed my problem in record time. For that I give him and tmobile a 5 star rating. 
Have a blessed day.

16 years with t-mobile. 4 deployments. All of a sudden on 5th deployment, I call to advise that being deployed and want to confirm no issues will arise with roaming. Assured the plan is good and there will be no issues. Couple months in, get notified my line will be blocked because of roaming. More phone calls (5 in fact, each time agent telling me everything is fine, not to worry). Another notice. Told to switch to military account and all will be good. Switch. Not good enough. Account in good standing. Switched back over to previous regular account.  Told block was removed. Hate to try and switch carriers in the middle of a deployment, but I'm doing my best to find a solution with a better carrier.
I am trying to port in a number, but 5 days the work has not done yet.
